// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated by Mutty.

#nullable enable

using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Collections.Immutable;
using System.Linq;

namespace Mutty.Tests
{
    /// <summary>
    /// The mutable wrapper for the <see cref="ComplexData"/> record.
    /// </summary>
    public partial class MutableComplexData
    {
        private ComplexData _record;

        /// <summary>
        /// Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="MutableComplexData"/> class.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="record">The record to wrap.</param>
        public MutableComplexData(ComplexData record)
        {
            _record = record;

            Name = _record.Name;
            NestedData = _record.NestedData.AsMutable();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Builds a new instance of the <see cref="ComplexData"/> class.
        /// </summary>
        public ComplexData Build()
        {
            OnBeforeBuild();
            return _record with
            {
                Name = this.Name,
                NestedData = this.NestedData.ToImmutable(),
            };
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Builds a new instance of the <see cref="ComplexData"/> record. Alias for <see cref="Build"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public ComplexData ToImmutable()
        {
            return Build();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Called at the start of <see cref="Build"/>, before the immutable record is produced.
        /// </summary>
        /// Implement this method in a user-defined partial class to validate or normalise state.
        partial void OnBeforeBuild();

        /// <summary>
        /// Performs an implicit conversion from <see cref="ComplexData"/> to <see cref="MutableComplexData"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public static implicit operator MutableComplexData(ComplexData record)
        {
            return new MutableComplexData(record);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Performs an explicit conversion from <see cref="MutableComplexData"/> to <see cref="ComplexData"/>.
        /// </summary>
        /// <remarks>Explicit because it allocates a new record; prefer <see cref="Build"/>.</remarks>
        public static explicit operator ComplexData(MutableComplexData mutable)
        {
            return mutable.Build();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the Name.
        /// </summary>
        public string Name { get; set; }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the ImmutableCollection NestedData.
        /// </summary>
        public List<Dictionary<string, int>> NestedData { get; set; }

        /// <summary>
        /// Sets <see cref="Name"/> and returns this wrapper so calls can be chained.
        /// </summary>
        public MutableComplexData WithName(string value)
        {
            Name = value;
            return this;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Sets <see cref="NestedData"/> and returns this wrapper so calls can be chained.
        /// </summary>
        public MutableComplexData WithNestedData(List<Dictionary<string, int>> value)
        {
            NestedData = value;
            return this;
        }
    }
}
